title: NORTH TILLAMOOK COUNTY FOOD BANK - 211info
text: NORTH COUNTY FOOD BANK NORTH TILLAMOOK COUNTY FOOD BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food boxes with about a week’s worth of groceries, including fresh produce and basic kitchen staples such as cooking oil, sugar, and flour. Also offers cat and dog food, diapers for children and adults, and personal hygiene items. People can choose items from a list; selections vary based on availability. 230 Rowe Street Wheeler, OR 97147 Eligibility: Must meet USDA guidelines; no one is turned away Hours: Tuesday noon-3pm Email (503) 368-7724 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 368-7724 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Bay City, Garibaldi, Manzanita, Nehalem, Rockaway Beach, Wheeler and North Tillamook County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Nehalem Bay Health District Building. From Highway 101, take Hospital Road. Accessible by Tillamook County Transportation District bus or Dial-A-Ride. Services: Diapers Food Pantries Incontinence Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Pet Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
